## Scope

## Four-Lens Checklist

- [ ] Brand: direct ZestStream voice, no filler, receipts over claims
- [ ] Sniff: no obvious theater, no invented substrate, no hidden manual step
- [ ] Jeff: versioned references, schema/CLI contracts, existing tools reused
- [ ] Public: useful to a fresh operator without exposing private material

## DCG-Clean Verification

- [ ] Explicit-path staging used
- [ ] No force-style destructive path unless bead-owned
- [ ] No dangerous shell strings added to prose
- [ ] No secret values, token fragments, or raw env output

## Three-Judges Sniff

- [ ] Jeff lens pass
- [ ] Donella lens pass
- [ ] {operator} lens pass
- [ ] Receipt path:

- [ ] Not applicable, reason:
